w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

wp:docPr.name: Picture 4
wp:docPr.descr:
A picture containing standing, woman, people
Description automatically generated

w:r.w:t: The dataset product can be used in many AI pilot projects and supplement production models with other data. It can improve
ataset is an excellent solution when time and budget is limited.
database team can provide a large number of database products
, such as ASR, TTS, video, text, image
. At the same time, we are also constantly building new datasets to expand resources. Database team always strive to deliver as soon as possible to meet the needs of the global customers.

This OCR database consists of image data in Korean, Vietnamese, Spanish, French, Thai, Japanese, Indonesian, Tamil, and Burmese, as well as handwritten images in both Chinese and English (including annotations). On average, each image contains 30 to 40 frames, including texts in various languages, special characters, and numbers. The accuracy rate requirement is over 99% (both position and content are correct)

wp:docPr.name: 图片 2
wp:docPr.descr:
A picture containing standing, woman, people
Description automatically generated

w:r.w:t: 成品数据集可以运行许多 AI 试点项目，并用其他数据补充生产模型，从而提高整体性能和成本效益。无论企业规模如何，在时间和预算紧张时，选择成品数据集都是绝佳的解决方案。Appen数据集产品涵盖多种类型的数据，包括图像、视频、音频和文本。我们也在不断构建新的数据集，以满足全球客户群的需求。
数据库为韩语、越南语、西班牙语、法语、泰语、日语、印尼语、泰米尔语、缅甸语
及中英文手写图片数据（含标注），每张图片平均30-40框，包含各语种文字、特殊字符及数字，准确率要求99%以上（位置和内容均正确
越南语文档类OCR图片数据
西班牙语文档类OCR图片数据
印尼语文档类OCR图片数据
泰米尔语文档类OCR图片数据
